creator: me@niklaas.eu
text:
Could it generally be the case that the plugins packaged with the FreeBSD port are a bit old and not in line with upstream?

I just figured out that `postfix_mailstats` upstream [1] has more features than the one in ports (it supports postscreen). This despite the fact that it works flawlessly on FreeBSD -- I only had to change the shebang. 

1: https://github.com/munin-monitoring/munin/blob/devel/plugins/node.d/postfix_mailstats
